Name: Pull Filtered Records
Description: Reads records from a beacon entity with optional filtering. Emits one event per record, driving downstream mapping cards row by row.

EventInputs.Name: Execute
EventInputs.Description: Begin pulling records from the source

EventInputs.Name: StepComplete
EventInputs.Description: Downstream finished processing the current record; advance to the next

EventOutputs.Name: RecordAvailable
EventOutputs.Description: A record is ready for processing

EventOutputs.Name: AllRecordsPulled
EventOutputs.Description: All records have been emitted and processed

SettingsInputs.Name: ConnectionHash
SettingsInputs.Description: URL-safe slug of the connection name
